dialog.title: OTP Verification Custom
dialog.content: Thank you for accessing the digital forms of Ceylinco Life. In order to proceed ahead, please enter the OTP you received via SMS. {{card_id}}

exampleField.label: Example Field {{card_id}}

en.otp.dialog.title: OTP Verification
en.otp.dialog.content: Thank you for accessing the digital forms of Ceylinco Life. In order to proceed ahead, please enter the OTP you received via SMS.
en.otp.dialog.input.label: OTP

si.otp.dialog.title: OTP සත්‍යාපනය
si.otp.dialog.content: සෙලින්කෝ ලයිෆ් ඩිජිටල් පෝරම වෙත පිවිසීම ගැන ස්තුතියි. ඉදිරියට යාමට, SMS මගින් ඔබට ලැබුණු OTP අංකය ඇතුළත් කරන්න.
si.otp.dialog.input.label: OTP

ta.otp.dialog.title: OTP சரிபார்ப்பு
ta.otp.dialog.content: செலின்கோ லைஃப் டிஜிட்டல் படிவங்களை அணுகியதற்கு நன்றி. தொடர, SMS மூலம் நீங்கள் பெற்ற OTP ஐ உள்ளிடவும்.
ta.otp.dialog.input.label: OTP
